1.title: L'arrivée à la capitale ! Que se passe-t-il pour Meiko ?
1.synopsis: Fraîchement arrivée à Tokyo depuis sa région natale, Meiko, nouvelle élève de l’école de jeunes filles Amamiya, se rend au dortoir du lycée pour s’y installer. Cependant, l’endroit, qui est aussi un manga café, est très différent de ce qu’elle imaginait. Elle y rencontre la gérante Rie Amamiya et ses autres camarades de dortoir, puis commencent la nouvelle année scolaire à leurs côtés.

2.title: Hedgehog Is Closing? Gotta Turn It Around!
2.synopsis: Meiko slowly settles into life at the manga cafe. But due to Rie's reckless management, the shop is on verge of closing. Will the girls be able to save the cafe in time?!

3.title: Rivals! Cat VS Hedgehog
3.synopsis: Michika Narumi, who works at the cat cafe in the building, suddenly shows up. She's upset that the manga cafe's expansion has reduced the cat cafe's space. It's the start of a battle between the two cafes!

4.title: It's Summer! It's Hot! Let's Go to the Tropics!
4.synopsis: It's summer, and the cafe is busy - until the air conditioning breaks, forcing a temporary closure. While it's being repaired, the girls (along with Michika) head off to a tropical resort getaway!

5.title: Meiko's Homecoming
5.synopsis: Summer break is coming, but Meiko flunks her exams and her, Neo and Marika have to retake several. With help from Rie, the girls and Michika cram together. Will they manage to evade the make-up classes and go home for the summer…?

6.title: The Magic Appraiser☆Magical Momorin
6.synopsis: After stepping out of the shower, Meiko realizes her underwear has mysteriously vanished. Can she make it all the way back to her room without anyone noticing she's going commando? Is Meiko facing the biggest crisis of her life!?

alt_titles.jp: Ichijyoma Mankitsu Gurashi!~Ichijōma Mankitsu Gurashi!~Ichijouma Mankitsu Gurashi!
alt_titles.us: Living Life to the Fullest in a Tiny One-Tatami-Mat-Sized Room~Savoring Life in a One-Tatami Room!
